label: multiplication
notes: RecursiveFunctionDef: primitive recursion on the last parameter; stepCase context is params[0..k-2] then n : N (predecessor, index 1 when innermost-but-one) then rec (the recursive value, index 0). Guardedness holds by construction - there is no self-application node (design SS3.2).

nsmBridge.note: iterated addition has no honest profile-1 rendering (the addition attempt already strains the grammar; iteration is out of reach).
